places.name: Gateway of India
places.description: It is one of Mumbai's most iconic landmarks, built in 1924 to overlook the Arabian Sea.
places.history: Built during British rule to welcome King George V and Queen Mary.

places.name: Taj Mahal
places.description: An immense mausoleum of white marble, built in Agra between 1631 and 1648 by order of the Mughal emperor Shah Jahan in memory of his favourite wife.
places.history: Built by Shah Jahan in memory of Mumtaz Mahal.
